name: io.github.tosin2013/helmdeck
title: Helmdeck
description: Self-hosted MCP server: sandboxed browser, desktop, vision, code-edit packs for any agent.

environmentVariables.name: HELMDECK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your helmdeck control plane (e.g. http://localhost:3000 for a local Compose install, or your reverse-proxied https URL)

environmentVariables.name: HELMDECK_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: JWT bearer token minted from your helmdeck control plane. Generate with: curl -X POST $HELMDECK_URL/api/v1/auth/login -d '{"username":"admin","password":"..."}'

environmentVariables.name: HELMDECK_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your helmdeck control plane reachable from the container network (e.g. http://host.docker.internal:3000)

environmentVariables.name: HELMDECK_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: JWT bearer token minted from your helmdeck control plane
